title: Jetpack
description: Equip a jetpack and soar with style.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

Jetpack is a fun and immersive plugin that introduces wearable jetpacks into Minecraft. By equipping a special leather chestplate marked with the lore “Jetpack”, players gain the ability to launch themselves into the air and glide safely with built-in slow falling. Sneaking activates thrust, propelling the player forward and upward while spawning flame particles for a realistic flight effect.

Players can obtain their jetpack using the /jetpack command (requires the configurable permission jetpack by default). The plugin automatically manages potion effects and cancels them if the player removes the jetpack, ensuring smooth gameplay.

Key features include:

Wearable jetpack as a special leather chestplate.

Sneak-to-thrust mechanic for realistic flight.

Automatic flame particle effects while boosting.

Slow falling effect for safe landings.

Permission-based command for secure access (jetpack by default).

Lightweight and efficient, with no external dependencies.

Integrated update checker and plugin metrics.

Donation message toggle in config.yml.

Perfect for survival servers, roleplay setups, or creative gameplay enhancements, Jetpack adds a unique and exciting way for players to travel. Future updates plan to include hover mode, fuel mechanics, and craftable consumable fuels for even more customization and balance.
